'''âv-n-h-w''' ('''kavanhewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impaint|impaint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impaint|impaint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-n-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kavanhewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivanhewoko|thivanhewoko]] || [[word:jivanhewoko|jivanhewoko]] || [[word:shivanhewoko|shivanhewoko]] || [[word:kivanhewoko|kivanhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvanhewoko|thuthuvanhewoko]] || [[word:jujuvanhewoko|jujuvanhewoko]] || [[word:shushuvanhewoko|shushuvanhewoko]] || [[word:kukuvanhewoko|kukuvanhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvanhewoko|thuvanhewoko]] || [[word:juvanhewoko|juvanhewoko]] || [[word:shuvanhewoko|shuvanhewoko]] || [[word:kuvanhewoko|kuvanhewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovanhewoko|thovanhewoko]] || [[word:jovanhewoko|jovanhewoko]] || [[word:shovanhewoko|shovanhewoko]] || [[word:kovanhewoko|kovanhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovanhewoko|thovanhewoko]] || [[word:jovanhewoko|jovanhewoko]] || [[word:shovanhewoko|shovanhewoko]] || [[word:kovanhewoko|kovanhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvanhewoko|thĂŠvanhewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvanhewoko|jĂŠvanhewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvanhewoko|shĂŠvanhewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvanhewoko|kĂŠvanhewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavanhewoko|thavanhewoko]] || [[word:javanhewoko|javanhewoko]] || [[word:shavanhewoko|shavanhewoko]] || [[word:kavanhewoko|kavanhewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
